heading: Step 2: Initialize the self-querying retriever.
body:
Run the following code to create a self-querying retriever
using the `MongoDBAtlasSelfQueryRetriever.from_llm` method.

```python
from langchain_mongodb.retrievers import MongoDBAtlasSelfQueryRetriever
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o")
retriever = MongoDBAtlasSelfQueryRetriever.from_llm(
    llm=llm,
    vectorstore=vector_store,
    metadata_field_info=metadata_field_info,
    document_contents=document_content_description
)

```

> **Tip:** [MongoDBAtlasSelfQueryRetriever API Reference](https://langchain-mongodb.readthedocs.io/en/latest/langchain_mongodb/retrievers/langchain_mongodb.retrievers.self_querying.MongoDBAtlasSelfQueryRetriever.html)
